channel.title: youtube on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in youtube on William Fang

item.title: youtube dl 神器介绍
item.description: 安装 ## CentOS sudo yum install epel-release sudo rpm -v --import http://li.nux.ro/download/nux/RPM-GPG-KEY-nux.ro sudo rpm -Uvh http://li.nux.ro/download/nux/dextop/el7/x86_64/nux-dextop-release-0-5.el7.nux.noarch.rpm sudo yum -y install ffmpeg ffmpeg-devel ## ubuntu sudo apt install ffmpeg ## 安装 youtube-dl sudo apt install python3-pip pip3 install youtube-dl #安装 pip3 install --upgrade youtube-dl #升级 ## 或者使用 apt 安装 sudo apt-get install youtube-dl 使用 设置代理 设置
